zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德可恩爾 奧 特維德時，她的父親Ralph de Cornhill49歲，母親Lady Alice de Hastings11歲。她於大約1274年與Henry De Honeford在英國英格蘭爾韓德福斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德可恩爾 奧 特維德时，她的父亲Ralph de Cornhill49岁，母亲Lady Alice de Hastings11岁。她于大约1274年与Henry De Honeford在英国英格兰爾韓德福斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name in SE England mainly from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumb) or one of the many minor places so called. It has often become   Cornell   and has sometimes been confused with   Cornwall  , and   Cornwell  , as in the case of Thomas Cornell, 1722 in   Parish Registers   (Horringer, Suffolk), who is also called Cornwall (1736), Cornwell (1740) and Cornhill (1766).

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Parish Registers
meanings: 1 English: relationship name, nickname from the Middle English personal name * Baioc, a diminutive of the personal name Bay . Redmonds notes Arthur Bake, Baick, or Bayock, 1621–32 in Parish Registers (Hampsthwaite, WR Yorks). Some bearers may belong with (2).

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Cornell
meanings: English: shortened form of Cornwell , Cornwall , or of Cornhill, a habitational name from a place in Northumberland named Cornhill, from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + halh ‘nook, recess’; or from Cornhill in London, a medieval grain exchange, named with Old English corn ‘corn, grain’ + hyll ‘hill’, or from some other place elsewhere similarly named.
English: possibly also a nickname from French corneille ‘rook, crow’, probably denoting a chatterer or someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

variants.name: Cornall
meanings: 1 English: the Lancs name is a variant of Corney , where -all and -ell are hypercorrect pronunciations of Cornah, Corner, and Cornoe, late pronunciations of Corney.

2 English: the Devon name is a variant of Cornwall . Here also probably belongs Gurnall, as in Joan Gurnall, 1586 in IGI (Crediton, Devon), and William Gurnall, 1650 in IGI (Lavenham, Suffolk). Compare Corney .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin was born about 1190, in Cornhill on Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph de Cornhill, was 49 and her mother, Lady Alice de Hastings, was 11. She married Henry De Honeford about 1274, in Handforth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin est née environ 1190, à Cornhill on Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Cornhill, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Hastings, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Henry De Honeford environ 1274, à Handforth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin è nata il circa 1190 nel Cornhill on Tweed, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph de Cornhill, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice de Hastings, aveva 11 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechinが約1190年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドコルンヒル オン トウィードで生まれた時，父Ralph de Cornhillは49歳，母Lady Alice de Hastingsは11歳であった。約1274年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハンドフォースでHenry De Honefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススコットランドで死去した。

ko.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 히리 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 코른힐  트위드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Cornhill(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice de Hastings(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 핸드포스에서 Henry De Honeford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Cornhill on Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Cornhill, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Hastings, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry De Honeford aproximadamente 1274, em Handforth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Cornhill Lady Brechin родилась около 1190 г. в местности корнилл он твид, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph de Cornhill было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Hastings, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry De Honeford около 1274 г. в местности хандфорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
